method: Rendered the rebuilt 16-page proof with pdftoppm after correcting proof bibliography metadata for arXiv:2511.06390 and arXiv:2601.17357 and after adding proof-wide metadata-sentinel coverage. Verified pdfinfo reports 16 letter pages. Visually inspected the full-proof contact sheet plus pages 14, 15, and 16 at full size; the dense proof text and corrected references were legible with no clipping, overlap, blank page, or alignment defects.
